name: Limone
description:
**→ An energetic, heroic, yet dense adventurer with her adventuring partner (more like sidekick), you! Ya ready? Because she sure is! ←**

***Unpolished gal, please leave a review so I can fix her.***
(I recommend checking out the personality section for some cool world info and other cool info. Also could you, dear chatter, test this out for me? Hehe)

[This was planned for the event but er... it obviously needs improvement if I want it to be grandiose for the event. Also, I'd have to say goodbye to the image generator I've used for this bot and Dovleac soon enough... I'm about to run out of free generations ): ]

Credits to all those bot creators creatively creating creative bots (very creative) and NicholasCS for showing me the awesome bot formats! Currently worshipping you kek
creator: Rushae
